data.title: Trump imposes 100% tariffs on China as they block rare earth exports, causing stock market fluctuations.
data.description: President Trump criticized China for restricting the export of rare earth minerals, stating that this action is holding the global market at its mercy. In response, he implemented significant tariffs on Friday evening. This move impacted the stock market, leading to a decline in the S&P 500 index while boosting the value of MP stocks. The tariffs imposed by Trump were set at 100%, reinforcing the escalating economic tensions between the two nations.

data.title: Search for missing man Michael Kocabay in Sun Valley, CA to resume with human remains detection K9 units and additional resources on Oct. 11.
data.description: In Sun Valley, California, search and rescue operations are set to restart on October 11, 2025, in the search for Michael Kocabay, who is still missing. The renewed mission will involve human remains detection K9 units and extra resources as part of the effort to locate him.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $102K on Binance following Trump's 100% tariffs on China, sparking trade and market concerns.
data.description: Following an announcement by Trump of imposing significant tariffs on China, Bitcoin experienced a sharp decline to $102,000 in the Binance perpetual futures pair. This news reignited concerns about potential market sell-offs and a wider trade war scenario.

data.title: BTC drops below $110K as Trump reveals 100% tariffs on China, sparking concerns of wider trade and market downturn.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin dropped below $110,000 following the announcement by Trump of significant tariffs on China on Friday. This has raised concerns about a potential widespread trade and market downturn.

data.title: 18th Street Design Collective hosted "The Power of Collaboration" event at Eichholtz Manhattan in Chelsea, attracting leaders in design, fashion, and cultural institutions in New York on Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: In Chelsea, on October 10, 2025, the 18th Street Design Collective organized an exclusive event titled "The Power of Collaboration," which was attended by leaders in design, fashion, and cultural institutions. The event aimed to foster dialogue and inspiration among attendees.

data.title: Almonty Industries Inc. files legal action against Pure Tungsten for false statements; alleges defamation.
data.description: Almonty Industries Inc., a prominent global tungsten concentrate producer, has taken legal action by filing a Notice of Application in the Ontario Superior Court of Justice against Pure Tungsten Inc. The filing aims to address inaccuracies in statements made by Pure Tungsten. Almonty is listed on NASDAQ (ALM), TSX (AII), ASX (AII), OTCQX (ALMTF), and Frankfurt (ALI1).

data.title: Bocana Resources Corp. to acquire equity interest in Venture Gold, Inc. through US$20M investment, forming Arizore LLC joint venture.
data.description: Bocana Resources Corp. (TSXV: BOCA) has announced an exciting development on Oct. 10, 2025, revealing their intention to invest up to US$20,000,000 in Venture Gold, Inc. This investment will be carried out through a non-binding letter of intent signed on October 6, 2025. The proposed equity investment interest will be made directly into Venture Gold's treasury, allowing the company to retain ownership of all its properties while utilizing the funds for property development, exploration, and working capital requirements. The investment is set to be executed via a newly established joint venture entity, Arizore LLC, with both Bocana Resources Corp. and Venture Gold still awaiting approval from the TSXV for this venture.
